patch.value: pm close --duplicate-of: structured duplicate tracking with auto-populated closure fields (GH-183, GH-160)

Add --duplicate-of <id> to pm close: validates target exists and is not itself closed-as-duplicate, sets duplicate_of metadata on the closed item, auto-populates resolution/expected_result/actual_result (suppressing close_validation_missing_fields warnings), standardizes the close reason, and adds a comment on the canonical item. Fixes GitHub issues #183 and #160.

Implemented and merged in PR #198 (merge commit df639239). GitHub CI passed including coverage/static/typecheck/compat/smokes/runtime/CodeQL; relevant GitHub issues were closed where fully covered. Evidence is consolidated under pm-z9e9. Remaining exact GH-191 work stays open under pm-vcr2.

author: codex-impl

patch.value: Implemented and merged in PR #198 (merge commit df639239).
